subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My handmaiden! On this day it behooveth the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree to make mention and sing the praise of God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی امروز سزاوار اوراق سدره ذکر و ثنای حق جل جلاله بوده
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for women, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
